title: Tao Te Ching 50
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 50 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 50 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Between birth and death, three in ten are followers of life, three in ten are followers of death.
